title: Marlowww Vanila PVP+
description: A clean PvP resource pack with short swords, smaller fire and improved item visibility.
body:
Kreklinok Pack

Kreklinok Pack is a PvP resource pack designed to make gameplay more comfortable while keeping the classic Minecraft style.

The pack improves item visibility and makes PvP clearer and more enjoyable without changing the vanilla feel of the game.

Features

 • Clean food and totem textures 
 
 ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f01f27fe1c63bc7b14ab3a2600a776b406d8bb22_0.webp)
 
 • Smaller fire for better visibility in combat 
 
 ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85bc62886dc7acd97571dd66fb448034dad1a365.png)


 • Short swords for easier PvP, • 32x32 tools
 
 ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c1410cc8c9a03269825005d9ed919955f57e6da.png)



 • Improved item visibility 
 
 • Vanilla-style textures 
 
 • Many small improvements and tweaks 

 If you see any bugs or bugs, please contact us at the discord server [Fusion Community](https://discord.com/invite/th8DfSNFWy)
